name: Legends Of Runeterra Converted: Call of the Mountain

cards.rules_text:
Ephemeral [i](This creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.)[/i]
When Pesky Specter is destroyed, random target opponent creates two Pesky Specter tokens.
Whenever Pesky Specter is exiled, each player exiles each creature they control named Pesky Specter.

As an additional cost to cast this spell, remove three experience counters from yourself.
Put a +2/+0 counter, a trample counter, and a first strike counter on target creature you control.

Focus [i](This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.)[/i]
You get an experience counter.
Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until the end of your turn.

Focus [i](This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.)[/i]
You get an experience counter.
Target creature you control gets trample until the end of your turn.

Focus [i](This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.)[/i]
You get an experience counter.
Target creature you control gets first strike until the end of your turn.
Remove all abilities and counters from target non-legendary creature.
Creatures you control get +2/+2.
Exile each creature opponents control with power 3 or less.
Put a stun counter onto two target creatures an opponent controls.
Exile target permanent.
{1}: Sacrifice Gem, remove 1 damage from target creature, then put a +1/+0 counter on it.

[i](You may cast a legendary sorcery only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.)[/i]
Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal X Celestial cards, then choose up to X Celestial cards revealed this way and add them to your hand where X is equal to the number of cards in your hand plus one, shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. Then untap all permanents you control.
Meteor Shower deals 4 damage to target creature and 1 damage to other target creature.

Put a +0/+2 counter and a spellshield counter on target creature you control. [i](The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]
The next spell you cast this turn costs {1} less to cast.
Exile two target permanents.

Search your library for a legendary creature, exile it, then shuffle. You may cast the creature exiled this way from exile for as long as it remains exiled, it costs {1} less to cast. When the creature exiled this way enters, put two +1/+1 counters on it.
Trample

Trample
The Destroyer enters with a spellshield counter. [i](The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]
When The Destroyer enters, put a +1/+0 counter on it for each Celestial creature you control, and each Celestial card in your graveyard.

Lifelink
When The Golden Sister enters, create a The Silver Sister token.

Flying, Fury [i](Whenever a creature dealt damage by The Great Beyond this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on The Great Beyond.)[/i]
The Great Beyond enters with a spellshield counter. [i](The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]
When The Great Beyond enters, put a +1/+0 counter on it for each Celestial creature you control, and for each Celestial card in your graveyard.

Flying
When The Immortal Fire enters, put a +1/+0 counter on it for each Celestial creature you control, and for each Celestial card in your graveyard.
Undying [i](When this creature dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.)[/i]
When The Messenger enters, draw a card.

Trample, Challenger [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)[/i]
When The Scourge enters, put a +1/+0 counter on it for each Celestial creature you control, and for each Celestial card in your graveyard.
Whenever The Scourge attacks, each other attacking creature you control gets +2/+2 and trample until the end of turn.
Challenger [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)[/i]
Skulk [i](This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.)[/i]

When The Traveler enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.
Skulk [i](This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.)[/i]
Challenger [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)[/i]

Captain Arrika enters with a spellshield counter. [i](The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]
When Captain Arrika enters, you may exile target creature an opponent controls until Captain Arrika leaves the battlefield.

Put a challenger counter on target creature you control. If the target creature is a dragon, draw a card. [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)[/i]

When Dragonguard Lieutenant enters, you may behold a Dragon, if you do, put a challenger counter on Dragonguard Lieutenant. [i](To behold a Dragon, choose a Dragon you control or reveal a Dragon card from your hand. Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)[/i]

When Dragonguard Lookout enters, you may behold a Dragon, if you do, untap each creature you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase. [i](To behold a Dragon, choose a Dragon you control or reveal a Dragon card from your hand.)[/i]

When Egghead Researcher enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three dragon creatures, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

For The Fallen costs {1} less to cast for each Knight you have cast this turn.
Create a Dauntless Vanguard token for each creature you control that was destroyed this turn.

Fury [i](Whenever a creature dealt damage by Kadregrin this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Kadregrin.)[/i]
When Kadregrin enters, put four +1/+1 counters on each other dragon creature you control.
Choose a creature you control with fury. That creature deals damage equal to its power to the two creatures with the lowest power among creatures target opponent controls.

Challenger, Fury [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature. Whenever a creature dealt damage by Screeching Dragon this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Screeching Dragon.)[/i]

Target creature you control gets +1/+2 and can block creatures with shadow as though it had shadow until the end of your next turn. [i](That creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.)[/i]

Fury [i](Whenever a creature dealt damage by Shyvana this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Shyvana.)[/i]
Whenever Shyvana attacks, Shyvana gets +1/+1 until the beginning of your next upkeep.
Whenever a dragon creature you control deals combat damage, put that many Dragonguard counters onto Shyvana. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Shyvana has sixteen or more Dragonguard counters, remove all Dragonguard counters from Shyvana and transform her.
Partner
cards.rules_text2:
Fury [i](Whenever a creature dealt damage by Dragonguard Shyvana this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Dragonguard Shyvana.)[/i]
Whenever Dragonguard Shyvana attacks, Dragonguard Shyvana gets +2/+2 until the beginning of your next upkeep. Then target creature you control fights target creature an opponent controls. If the creature you control is a dragon and it survives the fight, remove up to 5 damage from it. [i](Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)[/i]

cards.rules_text: Fury, Scout [i](Whenever a creature dealt damage by Stalking Broodmother this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Stalking Broodmother. After your first main phase, there is an additional combat phase. Only creatures with Scout may attack in this phase and they gain vigilance until end of combat.)[/i]
Instant and sorcery spells cost {1} more to cast.

Target creature you control fights target creature an opponent controls. If the creature you control is a dragon and it survives the fight, remove up to 5 damage from it. [i](Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)[/i]

Whenever a creature you control enters, that creature gets +1/+1 and challenger until the end of your next turn. [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)[/i]
When Fae Guide enters, put a shadow counter on other target creature you control. [i](This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.)[/i]
Whenever another creature you control targets Flower Child, put a +2/+0 counter on Flower Child.
Put a +1/+0 counter and a first strike counter on target creature you control. If the target creature has first strike, put a +1/+0 counter and a double strike counter on it instead.

Whenever another creature you control targets Fuzzy Caretaker, Fuzzy Caretaker gets +0/+3 until your next upkeep.
Whenever Fuzzy Caretaker attacks, other attacking target creature you control gets +3/+0 until the end of turn.

Exile target creature you control to create an exact token copy of it except it has Ephemeral.You may cast the creature exiled this way from exile for as long as it remains exiled. [i](That creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.)[/i]
Recall a creature or landmark you control to recall a creature or landmark an opponent controls. [i](A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)[/i]

Whenever Lulu attacks, other attacking target creature you control has base power and toughness 4/4 until the beginning of your next upkeep.
Whenever a creature you control targets another creature you control, put a Whimsy counter on Lulu. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Lulu has three or more Whimsy counters, remove all Whimsy counters from Lulu and transform her.
Partner
cards.rules_text2:
At the beginning of your upkeep you may choose one —
• Put a shield counter on target creature you control. [i](If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)[/i]
• Target creature an opponent controls gets Vulnerable until the end of the turn. [i](When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature you control.)[/i]
Whenever Lulu attacks, other attacking target creature you control has base power and toughness 5/5 until the beginning of your next upkeep.

cards.rules_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, put a Sanctuary counter on Monastery of Hirana if it does not have one.
{U}: Remove a Sanctuary counter from Monastery of Hirana to recall a creature you control. [i](A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)[/i]

Shadow, Ephemeral [i](This creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.)[/i]
When Mumblesprite enters, its power and toughness equals the power and toughness of target other creature you control.
Counter target spell with mana value 3 or less.

Pix! enters with a shield counter.
Whenever Pix! attacks, other attacking target creature you control gets +2/+1 until the end of turn.
Choose a creature, then recall each other creature and landmark. [i](A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)[/i]
Whenever Swole Squirrel deals combat damage, double its power.
Lifelink
When Trevor Snoozebottom attacks, create a tapped and attacking Mumblesprite token.
Target creature becomes a 1/1 blue Squirrel with no abilities until the end of your turn.

Skulk [i](This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.)[/i]
When Young Witch attacks, other attacking target creature you control gets +1/+0 and first strike until the end of turn.

As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature you control.

• Destroy target creature an opponent controls.
• Destroy target landmark an opponent controls.
[i]Nightfall[/i] — When Doombeast enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, put a +1/+0 counter on it for each Nightfall you triggered this turn.

Fearsome [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]
[i]Nightfall[/i] — When Duskrider enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, put a number of +1/+0 counters on Duskrider for each time you have triggered nightfall this turn.
You get an emblem with “Creatures you cast get +2/+2 and Ephemeral.” [i](That creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.)[/i]

Ephemeral, Fearsome [i](This creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it. Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]
Evershade Stalker can't block.
[i]Nightfall[/i] — When Evershade Stalker enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, create an exiled copy of Evershade Stalker. You may cast this copy from exile for as long as it remains exiled.

Sacrifice the nontoken creature with the highest mana value among creatures you control, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature with a mana value that costs 1 more than the sacrificed creature, put it onto the battlefield, until the end of turn it has haste, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

Go Hard deals 1 damage to target creature an opponent controls. You get 1 life and an experience counter.
Create two exiled copies of Go Hard. You may cast copies exiled this way from exile for as long as they remain exiled.
cards.rules_text2:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, remove three experience counters from yourself.
Pack Your Bags deals 5 damage to each opponent and each creature they control.

cards.rules_text:
Fearsome [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]
[i]Nightfall[/i] — When Nocturne enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, put a vulnerable counter on target creature an opponent controls, then all creatures your opponents control get -1/-0 until the beginning of your next upkeep. [i](When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature you control.)[/i]
Whenever a creature you control with fearsome or nightfall attacks, put a Shade counter onto Nocturne. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Nocturne has five or more Shade counters, remove all Shade counters from Nocturne, then transform him.
Partner
cards.rules_text2:
Fearsome [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]
When Nocturne transforms, put a vulnerable counter on target creature an opponent controls, then all creatures your opponents control get -1/-0 until the beginning of your next upkeep. [i](When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature you control.)[/i]
Creatures you control have fearsome.
Whenever you cast a creature, each creature your opponents control get -1/-0 until the beginning of your next upkeep.

cards.rules_text: Exile each creature that entered this turn if no mana was spent to cast it.
Create a Mistwraith token.

The next creature you cast this turn gets +1/+0 until the end of your next turn and a spellshield counter. [i](The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]

Reveal the top four cards in your library, you may choose a nonlegendary creature from among them, if you do, create a token copy of that creature on the battlefield, put an ephemeral counter on it, then add the chosen card to your hand, shuffle all other cards into your library. [i](That creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.)[/i]

[i]Nightfall[/i] — When Stygian Onlooker enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, Stygian Onlooker gets +2/+0 and fearsome until the end of your next turn. [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]

Unspeakable Horror deals 1 damage to any target. You gain that much life.
[i]Nightfall[/i] — When this spell resolves, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three creatures with nightfall, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other cards into your library.

At the beginning of your upkeep, sacrifice a nontoken creature with the greatest mana value among creatures you control. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card with mana value equal to 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value. Put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

Tap a creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. Then if you control a legendary creature named Darius or Darius, The Hand of Noxus, untap each creature you control and after this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

At the beginning of your end step, if Arrel the Tracker was targeted by a source you control, Arrel the Tracker deals damage equal to its power to the creature with the lowest power among creatures target opponent controls.
When Basilisk Bloodseeker enters, Basilisk Bloodseeker deals 1 damage to target creature you control and target creature an opponent controls. Repeat this process three times.
When Blade Squire is destroyed, search your library for a Rune card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
When Brutal Hunter enters, it gets First strike until the end of your next turn.
Target opponent reveals their hand, then discards the creature card with the lowest power from among them.

At the end of your turn, the creature with highest power among creatures you control, and the creature with lowest power among creatures target opponent controls fight. [i](Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)[/i]

Whenever Riven enters, attacks, or at the end of your turn if Riven did not attack, search your library and/or graveyard for a Rune card, reveal it, then it to your hand. If you searched your library this way, shuffle.
The first time you cast a card named Blade of the Exile, transform Riven.
Partner
cards.rules_text2:
Whenever Riven enters, attacks, or at the end of your turn if Riven did not attack, search your library and/or graveyard and/or exile for a Rune card, reveal it, then it to your hand. If you searched your library this way, shuffle.
Each turn the first time a source you control increases Riven's power, put that many +1/+0 counters on Riven.

cards.rules_text: When Runeweaver enters, search your library for a Rune card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

Choose one —
• Destroy target damaged creature.
• Destroy target landmark.
Target creature you control gets +3/+2 until the end of the your turn.

Creatures you control get Indestructible until the end of your next turn.
If Survival Skills is discarded or milled, the creature with the highest power among creatures you control gets Indestructible until the end of your next turn.
Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until the end of turn. Then search your library for a Rune card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

Choose a creature you control, that creature deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. If the creature you control has trample, excess damage is dealt to the target creatures controller.
Challenger [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)[/i]

Trample, Juggernaut [i](After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)[/i]
When Augur of the Old Ones enters, if you behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, give target creature Trample and Juggernaut. [i](To behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, choose a card with mana value 8 or greater you control or reveal a card with mana value 8 or greater from your hand.)[/i]
Reveal the top four cards of your library, then put each Poro, Yeti, and Elnuk creature among them into your hand, shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

When Faces of the Old Ones enters, put a Freljord counter onto a land you control.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may Behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, if you do, put a Freljord counter onto a land you control. [i](To behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, choose a card with mana value 8 or greater you control or reveal a card with mana value 8 or greater from your hand.)
[/i]Whenever a land you control with a Freljord counter is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional one mana of any type that land can produce.

Choose 3, 4, or 5, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal that many legendary creatures, randomly choose two with different names from among them, and put them onto the battlefield under your control, they have base power and toughness 10/10, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

Vulnerable [i](When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature you control.)[/i]
When Ice Pillar enters from exile add {G}{G}{G}{G}{G}{G}{G}{G}.
When Ice Pillar enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, the creature with the highest power among creatures target opponent controls gets Vulnerable until the beginning of your next upkeep.
All creatures get -3/-0 until the end of your next turn. Then Icequake deals 3 damage to all creatures.

When It That Stares enters, choose one —
• Exile all enchantments.
• It That Stares deals 3 damage to each other creature.

Reveal a creature in your hand, you gain X life where X is that creatures power. If you are Enlightened, put the revealed creature onto the battlefield. [i](The first time you spend 10 or more mana in the same turn, you are Enlightened for the rest of the game.)[/i]

At the beginning of your upkeep, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a legendary creature, exile it, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.
You may cast cards exiled this way for as long as it remains exiled.

Whenever a creature you control is dealt damage but is not destroyed, put a +1/+0 counter on it, then put an Absorb 1 counter on that creature if it doesn't have an Absorb counter. [i](If a source would deal damage to that creature, prevent 1 of that damage.)[/i]
Target creature you control gets +0/+2 and target creature an opponent controls gets -2/-0 until the end of your next turn.

Choose one —
• Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature.
• Put a juggernaut counter on target creature. [i](After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)[/i]

When Troll Ravager enters, you may behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, if you do, put a juggernaut counter on Troll Ravager. [i](To behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, choose a card with mana value 8 or greater you control or reveal a card with mana value 8 or greater from your hand. After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)[/i]

When Troll Scavenger enters, you may behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, if you do, put three +1/+0 counters on Troll Scavenger. [i](To behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, choose a card with mana value 8 or greater you control or reveal a card with mana value 8 or greater from your hand.)[/i]

Juggernaut [i](After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)[/i]
When Trundle enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Ice Pillar, and exile it. If you search your library this way, shuffle. You may cast the card exiled this way from exile for as long as it remains exiled.
When a card named Ice Pillar you control enters, transform Trundle.
Partner
cards.rules_text2:
Trample, Juggernaut [i](After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)[/i]
Whenever Trundle attacks, you may behold any number of cards with mana value 8 or greater, if you do, put a +1/+0 counter on Trundle for each card beheld this way. [i](To behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, choose a card with mana value 8 or greater you control or reveal a card with mana value 8 or greater from your hand.)[/i]

cards.rules_text: Challenger, Juggernaut [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature. After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)[/i]

Add {G}{G}.
Reveal the top five cards of your library, put each card with mana value 8 or greater from among them into your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

[i]Daybreak[/i] — When Sun Guardian enters, if it was the first spell you cast this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Sun Guardian.
Whenever another daybreak ability you control triggers, put a +1/+1 counter on Sun Guardian.

Trample
Arbiter of the Peak costs {1} less to cast for each time an instant, sorcery, or creature you control has targeted a creature you control this turn.
Remove 4 damage from target creature you control. Put four +0+1 counters on that creature.

Fury [i](Whenever a creature dealt damage by Aurelion Sol this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Aurelion Sol.)[/i]
Aurelion Sol enters with a spellshield counter. [i](The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]
When Aurelion Sol enters, and at the beginning of your upkeep, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.
At the beginning of your end step, if you have 20 or more power among creatures you control, transform Aurelion Sol.
Partner
cards.rules_text2:
Fury [i](Whenever a creature dealt damage by Aurelion Sol this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Aurelion Sol.)[/i]
When Aurelion Sol transforms, put a spellshield counter on him. [i](The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]
When Aurelion Sol transforms, and at the beginning of your upkeep, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.
You may cast Celestial cards without paying it's mana cost.

cards.rules_text: Put a +1/+1 counter and a spellshield counter on target creature you control. [i](The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]
Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.
Put three +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.
At the beginning of your upkeep, put three -0/-1 counters on Broadbacked Protector. You gain 3 life.

Challenger [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)[/i]
[i]Daybreak[/i] — When Commander Leona enters, if it was the first spell you cast this turn, tap the creature with the highest power among creatures target opponent controls and put a stun counter on it.
Whenever a source you control triggers its daybreak ability, put a Dawn counter onto Commander Leona. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Commander Leona has four or more Dawn counters, remove all Dawn counters from Commander Leona, then transform her.
Partner
cards.rules_text2:
Challenger [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)[/i]
Whenever a source you control triggers its daybreak ability, tap the creature with the highest power among creatures target opponent controls without a stun counter, put a stun counter on it, then put a shield counter onto Leona if she doesn't have one.

Trample
[i]Nightfall[/i] — When Crescent Guardian enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, put a +2/+0 counter on Crescent Guardian.

Shadow [i](This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.)[/i]
[i]Nightfall[/i] — When Cygnus enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, a creature you control gets Shadow until the end of your next turn.

Whenever a source you control triggers its nightfall ability, put a Dusk counter onto Diana. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Diana has four or more Dusk counters, remove all Dusk counters from Diana, then transform her.
Partner
cards.rules_text2:
First strike
Whenever a source you control triggers its nightfall ability, Diana gets challenger and +2/+0 until the end of turn. [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Choose one —
• Destroy target landmark.
• Search your library for a landmark card, reveal it and add it to your hand, then shuffle.

Choose one —
• Put a +1/+1 counter and a trample counter on each dragon creature you control.
• Search your library for two dragon creatures with different names, reveal them, add them to your hand, then shuffle.

Fury [i](Whenever a creature dealt damage by Eclipse Dragon this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Eclipse Dragon.)[/i]
[i]Daybreak[/i] — When Eclipse Dragon enters, if it was the first spell you cast this turn, the next dragon or celestial creature you cast costs {2} less to cast this turn.
[i]Nightfall[/i] — When Eclipse Dragon enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, choose one —
• Reveal the top card of your library until you reveal a dragon creature, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.
• Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

Lifelink
